items.situation: study abroad information session with returned students
items.announcement: Good afternoon, everyone. I'm pleased to invite you to our Study Abroad Information Session this Thursday at 4 p.m. in Room 210 of the International Center. Several students who recently returned from programs in Spain and Japan will be there to share their experiences and answer your questions. We'll also walk you through the application timeline and explain how your financial aid transfers overseas. If you'd like to attend, please reserve a seat through the study abroad website by Wednesday evening, since space in the room is limited. We hope to see you there.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite students to a study abroad session
options.B: To announce results of overseas applications
options.C: To describe one student's trip to Spain
options.D: To discourage students from studying abroad

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是邀请学生参加周四的留学信息说明会，并介绍会上有返校学生分享经验和讲解申请流程。B错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有公布任何申请结果，只是介绍说明会内容。C错误（too_narrow）：去过西班牙的学生只是分享者之一，把整体目的缩小成一次旅行太片面。D错误（reversed_intent）：通知是在鼓励、邀请学生了解留学，而非劝阻，意思完全相反。

questions.stem: What must students do in order to attend the session?

options.A: Submit a financial aid form in advance
options.B: Email a returned student before Thursday
options.C: Reserve a seat on the website by Wednesday
options.D: Pick up a ticket at the International Center

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说由于房间座位有限，想参加的人需在周三晚前通过留学网站预约座位。A错误（misattributed_detail）：财政资助只是会上会讲解的话题，并非参会的前提条件。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：返校学生只是到场分享，通知没要求学生提前发邮件联系他们。D错误（wrong_detail）：报名方式是网上预约，而不是去国际中心领取门票。

items.situation: student art market in the quad
items.announcement: Attention students. The Visual Arts Club is hosting its annual Student Art Market this Saturday from 11 a.m. to 4 p.m. on the main quad. Student vendors will sell original paintings, prints, and handmade ceramics, and all sales go directly to the artists themselves. Because the club covers the table fees through its budget, there's no charge for students who want to set up a booth. However, anyone selling must register their booth by Thursday so we can arrange the layout and order enough tables. We'll move the whole event into the Student Union lobby if it rains, so check our page Saturday morning.

questions.stem: What is required of students who wish to sell their work?

options.A: They must pay a small table fee in advance
options.B: They must register their booth by Thursday
options.C: They must donate a portion of their sales
options.D: They must bring their own folding table

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知明确说想摆摊售卖的人必须在周四前登记摊位，以便安排布局和准备足够的桌子。A错误（wrong_detail）：通知说俱乐部用预算承担了桌位费，学生摆摊免费，与收费相反。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知说销售收入全部归艺术家本人，没有要求捐出任何比例。D错误（misattributed_detail）：桌子是由俱乐部订购提供的，而不是要学生自带。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the event's location on Saturday?

options.A: It will be cancelled if the weather is poor
options.B: It has been permanently moved indoors
options.C: It charges admission to cover the venue
options.D: It may take place inside if it rains

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知说如果下雨，整个活动会挪进学生活动中心大厅，因此可以推断地点可能由室外改为室内，取决于天气。A错误（over_inference）：通知给的是改到室内的备选方案，而非取消，推断成取消超出原文。B错误（wrong_detail）：默认地点是主广场，只有下雨才临时改到室内，并非永久搬到室内。C错误（unrelated_inference）：通知没有任何关于入场收费的信息，凭空捏造。

items.situation: building wing closure for asbestos removal
items.announcement: Attention faculty and students. Please be aware that the east wing of Harlow Hall will be closed for the next two weeks, beginning this Monday, so that crews can safely remove asbestos discovered during recent renovation work. All classes normally held in that wing have been relocated, and updated room assignments are posted outside the main entrance and on the campus portal. During the closure, the east stairwell and the second-floor restrooms will also be inaccessible. We understand this is disruptive, and we appreciate your patience while the work is completed. Please check the portal each morning, as the timeline could shift depending on inspection results.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.B: To remind students of an inspection schedule
options.C: To inform people of a wing closure for safety work
options.D: To encourage faculty to use the east stairwell

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知的核心是告知Harlow Hall东翼将关闭两周以清除石棉，并说明课程改地点和受影响区域。A错误（wrong_purpose）：通知是因装修中发现石棉而关闭，不是宣传翻新好的教室。B错误（too_narrow）：检查只是文末提到时间可能变动的一个细节，不是整体目的。D错误（reversed_intent）：通知说东楼梯在关闭期间无法使用，与鼓励使用恰好相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the closure timeline?

options.A: It might end up being longer or shorter than two weeks
options.B: It will definitely finish exactly on schedule
options.C: It applies to the entire Harlow Hall building
options.D: It was caused by a problem with the portal

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知说时间表可能根据检查结果变动，并让大家每天查看门户网站，由此可推断两周只是预估，实际可能更长或更短。B错误（over_inference）：通知恰恰强调时间可能变化，断定一定准时结束与原文相反。C错误（wrong_detail）：关闭的只是东翼，而非整栋Harlow Hall。D错误（unrelated_inference）：关闭原因是发现石棉，与门户网站毫无关系，门户只是查信息的渠道。

items.situation: parking lot closure for alumni weekend with shuttle alternative
items.announcement: Good morning, students and staff. Due to this weekend's Homecoming celebration, the North Lot beside the gymnasium will be closed to regular permit holders starting Friday at noon. The lot is being reserved for visiting alumni and event vendors through Sunday evening. To make up for the lost spaces, we'll run a free shuttle every fifteen minutes between the West overflow lot and the central campus from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. Any permit vehicle left in the North Lot after noon on Friday may be ticketed. Thanks for helping us welcome our alumni back to campus this weekend.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A new permanent parking policy for students
options.B: A fee increase for campus parking permits
options.C: A celebration planned by visiting alumni
options.D: A temporary lot closure and shuttle plan

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知主要说明因返校周末North Lot临时关闭，并提供免费班车作为替代方案。A错误（wrong_purpose）：关闭只是周末临时的，并非新的长期停车政策。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知完全没提到停车证涨价。C错误（too_narrow）：返校庆典只是导致关闭的背景原因，把整体内容说成校友办的庆典偏离了主旨。

questions.stem: What alternative is offered to affected permit holders?

options.A: A discount on next semester's permit
options.B: A free shuttle from the West overflow lot
options.D: Permission to park along the campus loop

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知明确说为弥补失去的车位，将在西侧溢流停车场和校园中心之间每15分钟运行一班免费班车。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没提到任何停车证折扣。C错误（misattributed_detail）：体育馆只是North Lot旁边的地标，并没有在馆内提供车位。D错误（wrong_detail）：通知给出的替代是班车，并未允许沿校园环路停车。

items.situation: industry professional speaking about career paths
items.announcement: I want to let you all know that we'll have a special guest joining our class next Tuesday. Ms. Reyes, a senior engineer at a robotics firm, will talk about the different career paths open to graduates in our field. She'll spend the first half describing her own journey and the second half taking your questions, so come prepared with something to ask. Because she's offered to review resumes afterward, please bring a printed copy if you'd like feedback. We'll meet in our usual room, but I've pushed the start time to 1 p.m. so she can stay longer. Don't miss it.

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the session?

options.A: A printed copy of their resume
options.B: A laptop for an online demonstration
options.C: A signed permission slip from an advisor
options.D: A short summary of the robotics field

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。教授说Reyes女士愿意会后帮忙看简历，想要反馈的同学请带一份打印好的简历。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没有提到笔记本电脑或线上演示。C错误（misattributed_detail）：通知里没有任何许可单或导师签字的要求，属于把其他场景的要求错置过来。D错误（wrong_detail）：嘉宾会自己讲述职业经历，没有要求学生提交行业总结。

questions.stem: Why does the professor mention moving the start time to 1 p.m.?

options.A: Because the usual room was unavailable earlier
options.B: Because attendance has been low recently
options.C: To allow more time for the guest's visit
options.D: To match the robotics firm's office hours

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。教授说把开始时间推到下午1点，是为了让嘉宾能多待一会儿，因此可推断改时间是为给来访留更多时间。A错误（unrelated_inference）：通知说仍在平时的教室上课，并未说教室更早时段被占用。B错误（unrelated_inference）：通知没有任何关于出勤率低的信息。D错误（over_inference）：通知没有提到要配合公司的办公时间，属于过度推断。
